title: The Nemesis List
content: The cafe is crowded, filled with the indifferent noise of commuters. Arthur slides a folded, stained piece of paper across the table.||'Thomas told me to burn this if he died. But he didn't tell me he was a millionaire,' he whispers bitterly. 'This is the NEMESIS file. It's a list of people he was planning to take down with him if he ever got caught.'||You unfold the paper. It's a list of high-profile targets: Thorne, Miller, leaders of the Cleaners. At the very bottom, your name is written in Vane's neat script, with a single note: **'The only one who can finish it.'**
